seo.title: Hu Tao Build Guide — GenshinGuide
seo.description: Complete Hu Tao build guide for Genshin Impact v4.8. Best weapons ranked (Staff of Homa, Dragon's Bane), optimal artifacts (Crimson Witch, Shimenawa), team compositions (Double Hydro, Vape), and rotation guide.

intro: Hu Tao is a top-tier Pyro polearm main DPS. Her E sacrifices HP to infuse her attacks with Pyro and massively boost her ATK based on max HP. She deals devastating charged attack DMG when below 50% HP. She requires animation canceling to reach her ceiling — C1 eliminates stamina concerns. This guide covers everything you need to build her optimally in v4.8.
weapon_bottom_line: Staff of Homa is BiS and practically tailor-made for Hu Tao. Dragon's Bane (R5) is shockingly strong for vape — often better than 5-star stat sticks. Only pull Homa if you want the absolute best.

weapons.name: Staff of Homa
weapons.notes: Signature. HP to ATK conversion + massive CRIT DMG. Made for Hu Tao.

weapons.name: Dragon's Bane R5
weapons.notes: Best F2P. EM + DMG% vs Hydro/Pyro. Perfect for vape. R5 rivals 5-stars.

weapons.name: Deathmatch
weapons.notes: BP weapon. High CRIT Rate makes building easier. Solid stat stick.

weapons.name: White Tassel
weapons.notes: Budget 3★. CRIT Rate + NA DMG bonus. Surprisingly good for CA spam.

artifact_alt: 4pc Shimenawa's Reminiscence (higher CA damage, but drains energy — managing burst uptime is harder). 4pc Crimson Witch is the goal for vape consistency.

main_stats.sands_note: HP% best for damage and survival. EM sands if using Dragon's Bane + low EM subs.
main_stats.goblet_note: Always Pyro DMG. HP% goblet is a significant damage loss.
main_stats.circlet_note: Aim for 1:2 ratio. ~70% CR, ~200%+ CD with Homa.

sub_priority: CRIT Rate / CRIT DMG (1:2 ratio — she needs both)
Elemental Mastery (100-200 — essential for vape DMG)
ATK% (low priority — Hu Tao gets massive ATK from her E already)

teams.name: Team 1: Double Hydro
teams.desc: Hu Tao + Yelan + Xingqiu + Zhongli. The best Hu Tao team. Double Hydro resonance (+25% HP) benefits Hu Tao. Massive vape uptime. Zhongli prevents low-HP deaths.

teams.name: Team 2: VV Vape
teams.desc: Hu Tao + Xingqiu + Kazuha + Bennett. Kazuha swirls Pyro for VV shred + DMG bonus. Bennett's healing is anti-synergy (Hu Tao wants

teams.name: Team 3: Funerational
teams.desc: Hu Tao + Yelan + Xingqiu + Xiangling. All gas, no brakes. Triple Pyro/Hydro offense. No shielder — high risk, very high reward. Needs good dodging.

rotation_code: Zhongli hold E → Xingqiu E Q E → Yelan E Q → Hu Tao E → CA spam (C1: dash cancel, C0: jump cancel) → Q (when low HP or iframe)
mistakes: ❌ Building too much ATK. Hu Tao converts HP to ATK with her E. ATK% substats are nearly wasted — focus on HP% and EM instead.
❌ Too little EM. Without EM, vape DMG is significantly lower. Aim for 100-200 EM from subs or weapon. Dragon's Bane solves this automatically.
❌ Not jump/dash canceling at C0. Without canceling, Hu Tao's CA sends her flying and wastes time. Jump cancel (C0) or dash cancel (C1) between each CA.
❌ Healing Hu Tao above 50% HP. Her A4 passive gives 33% Pyro DMG bonus when below 50% HP. Avoid healers — use shields instead (Zhongli).
